assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly checks Istio version compatibility with GKE 1.32 and recommends Istio 1.19+ for GKE 1.32

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response includes checking current Istio version and GKE 1.32 compatibility as part of pre-upgrade assessment

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response clearly recommends upgrading Istio first in the upgrade order, before upgrading GKE control plane

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response does not specifically mention mutating webhook or explain how sidecar injection works during node drain/recreation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to verify sidecar versions and addresses gradual workload migration with sidecar version verification

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes monitoring for sidecar version mismatches and provides commands to check for version skew across the mesh

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response provides multiple commands including 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', and kubectl commands to check proxy sync status

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response includes a section on 'Sidecar Version Mismatches' as a common gotcha and provides commands to check for version skew issues
